name: Service Installed on a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when a service has been created on a compromised host.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5002197) A service was installed in a system
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
TD_list: APPLY Service Installed on a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5002197) A service was installed in a system
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
RED_list: Event name: A Service Has Been Installed in a Compromised Host
Event description: A Service Has Been Installed in a Compromised Host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
